svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Claude" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="architecture-overview" name="Pipeline Architecture"> <mxGraphModel dx="1205" dy="834" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1654" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="1"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle; whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=22;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1a1a2e;" value="Real-Time E-Commerce Order Processing Pipeline" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="1100" x="140" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle; whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=12;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#555555;" value="Local Development Stack · Kafka + PySpark + Delta Lake + Streamlit" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="1100" x="140" y="62" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="100" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=36;fillColor=#FFF3E0;strokeColor=#E65100; fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#E65100;rounded=1;arcSize=5;" value="① PRODUCER" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="310" width="180" x="40" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="101" parent="100" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFE0B2;strokeColor=#E65100;fontSize=10;" value="<b>order_producer.py</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="150" x="15" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="102" parent="100" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF3E0;strokeColor=#E65100;fontSize=10;" value="Faker Library
(fake orders)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="150" x="15" y="117" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="103" parent="100" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF3E0;strokeColor=#E65100; fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;" value="Rate: ~1 order / sec
(configurable)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="150" x="15" y="175" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="104" parent="100" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF8E1;strokeColor=#E65100; fontSize=9;fontStyle=3;" value="{ order_id, category,
 amount, timestamp }" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="150" x="15" y="233" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="200" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=36;fillColor=#E3F2FD;strokeColor=#1565C0; fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#1565C0;rounded=1;arcSize=5;" value="② MESSAGE BROKER" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="310" width="190" x="270" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="201" parent="200" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#BBDEFB;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=10;" value="<b>Topic: "orders"</b>
port 9092" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="15" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="202" parent="200" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E3F2FD;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=10;" value="Kafka Broker
(Confluent 7.5)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="160" x="15" y="123" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="203" parent="200" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E3F2FD;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=10;" value="Zookeeper
port 2181" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="160" x="15" y="181" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="204" parent="200" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8EAF6;strokeColor=#3949AB;fontSize=10;" value="Kafka UI
port 8080 🖥" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="160" x="15" y="239" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="300" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=36;fillColor=#FCE4EC;strokeColor=#AD1457; fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#AD1457;rounded=1;arcSize=5;" value="③ STREAM PROCESSING" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="310" width="200" x="510" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="301" parent="300" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F8BBD9;strokeColor=#AD1457;fontSize=10;" value="<b>order_processor.py</b>
PySpark 3.5" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="170" x="15" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="302" parent="300" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FCE4EC;strokeColor=#AD1457;fontSize=10;" value="JSON Parsing
+ Schema Enforcement" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="170" x="15" y="118" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="303" parent="300" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FCE4EC;strokeColor=#AD1457;fontSize=10;" value="Watermark: 2 min
(late data tolerance)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="170" x="15" y="166" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="304" parent="300" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FCE4EC;strokeColor=#AD1457;fontSize=10;" value="Tumbling Window: 1 min
SUM / COUNT / AVG" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="170" x="15" y="214" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="305" parent="300" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FCE4EC;strokeColor=#AD1457; fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;" value="Trigger: every 10s" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="170" x="15" y="262" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="400" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=36;fillColor=#E8F5E9;strokeColor=#2E7D32; fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#2E7D32;rounded=1;arcSize=5;" value="④ DELTA LAKE STORAGE" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="310" width="210" x="760" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="401" parent="400" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#C8E6C9;strokeColor=#2E7D32;fontSize=10;" value="🥉 BRONZE
<b>delta/raw_orders</b>
All raw events · Append" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="68" width="180" x="15" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="402" parent="400" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#A5D6A7;strokeColor=#2E7D32;fontSize=10;" value="🥈 SILVER
<b>delta/aggregated</b>
Windowed agg · Update" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="68" width="180" x="15" y="136" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="403" parent="400" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8F5E9;strokeColor=#2E7D32;fontSize=10;" value="ACID Transactions
Time Travel
Schema Evolution" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="15" y="222" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="500" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=36;fillColor=#EDE7F6;strokeColor=#4527A0; fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#4527A0;rounded=1;arcSize=5;" value="⑤ VISUALIZATION" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="310" width="200" x="1020" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="501" parent="500" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D1C4E9;strokeColor=#4527A0;fontSize=10;" value="<b>Streamlit Dashboard</b>
port 8501 🖥" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="170" x="15" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="502" parent="500" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EDE7F6;strokeColor=#4527A0;fontSize=10;" value="KPI Cards + Bar Chart
Line Chart + Pie Chart
Auto-refresh: 5s" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="15" y="118" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="503" parent="500" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EDE7F6;strokeColor=#4527A0;fontSize=10;" value="<b>query_delta.py</b>
Batch Queries" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="170" x="15" y="196" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="504" parent="500" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EDE7F6;strokeColor=#4527A0; fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;" value="deltalake (delta-rs)
No JVM required" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="170" x="15" y="252" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="600" edge="1" parent="1" source="100" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto; exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0; fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#E65100; strokeColor=#E65100;strokeWidth=2; labelBackgroundColor=#FFFFFF;" target="200" value="JSON events
(kafka-python)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="601" edge="1" parent="1" source="200" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto; exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0; fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1565C0; strokeColor=#1565C0;strokeWidth=2; labelBackgroundColor=#FFFFFF;" target="300" value="readStream
(Kafka connector)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="602" edge="1" parent="1" source="300" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto; exitX=1;exitY=0.38;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.3;entryDx=0;entryDy=0; fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#AD1457; strokeColor=#AD1457;strokeWidth=2; labelBackgroundColor=#FFFFFF;" target="400" value="writeStream
append"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="603" edge="1" parent="1" source="300" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto; exitX=1;exitY=0.62;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.58;entryDx=0;entryDy=0; fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#AD1457; strokeColor=#AD1457;strokeWidth=2; labelBackgroundColor=#FFFFFF;" target="400" value="writeStream
update"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="604" edge="1" parent="1" source="400" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto; exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0; fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#2E7D32; strokeColor=#2E7D32;strokeWidth=2; labelBackgroundColor=#FFFFFF;" target="500" value="batch read
(delta-rs)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="700" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontSize=9; fontColor=#888888;fontStyle=2;" value="Python 3.10
kafka-python 2.0
Faker 24" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="180" x="40" y="425" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="701" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontSize=9; fontColor=#888888;fontStyle=2;" value="Docker Compose
Confluent 7.5
cp-kafka / cp-zookeeper" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="190" x="270" y="425" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="702" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontSize=9; fontColor=#888888;fontStyle=2;" value="PySpark 3.5
Delta Spark 3.1
spark-sql-kafka" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="510" y="425" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="703" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontSize=9; fontColor=#888888;fontStyle=2;" value="Delta Lake 3.1
ACID · Time Travel
Parquet + Transaction Log" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="210" x="760" y="425" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="704" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontSize=9; fontColor=#888888;fontStyle=2;" value="Streamlit 1.32
Plotly 5.20
deltalake 0.17" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="1020" y="425" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
